name: Penile Enhancement
description: A range of non-surgical and surgical treatments to enhance penile size and appearance.

name: Erectile Dysfunction Treatment
description: Medical care for erectile dysfunction, including non-invasive and surgical solutions.

name: Hormonal Optimization
description: Treatment to optimize hormone levels for overall health and well-being.

name: Surgical Procedures
description: A range of surgical procedures for men's health and aesthetic concerns.

name: Hair Restoration
description: Non-surgical and surgical treatments for hair loss and restoration.

name: Skin Rejuvenation
description: A range of treatments for skin rejuvenation and anti-aging.

name: Fat-dissolving injections
description: Fat-dissolving injections use a solution, most commonly based on deoxycholic acid (a bile-acid molecule the body already makes), delivered as a grid of tiny injections into the fat under the chin.

name: Fat freezing (cryolipolysis / CoolSculpting)
description: Cryolipolysis uses a cupped applicator to draw the submental fat into controlled cooling.

name: Submental liposuction
description: Liposuction remains the most direct way to remove a defined volume of submental fat in a single procedure.

name: Liposuction with skin tightening
description: Liposuction can be combined with a skin-tightening step (for example radiofrequency-assisted devices) in the same sitting.

name: Online video consultation (30 min with a men's health doctor)
HPV Testing and Treatment
description: Menscape Clinic offers HPV testing and treatment services, including wart removal and anal screening.

name: Full Men's STI Screen
description: A multi-infection panel that checks for various STIs, not including HPV.

name: Men's Health Check-up
description: A structured check-up that includes a genital exam and discussion of HPV-related concerns.

name: Self-applied at home: Prescription topical: imiquimod 5% (course of sachets)
Clinic removal, single wart (laser or electrosurgery)
HPV Vaccination
description: A preventive medical service that protects against human papillomavirus (HPV) and its associated cancers and genital warts.

name: Prescription topical (podophyllotoxin or imiquimod), home course
description: Home creams are the cheapest but slowest. Podophyllotoxin and imiquimod are not products to source informally, both because dosing and application technique matter and because the wrong diagnosis wastes weeks.

name: Cryotherapy (freezing), per session
description: A good all-rounder for small to moderate external warts. It is quick, needs no injection for small lesions, and is safe in situations where creams are not ideal.

name: Electrocautery / electrosurgery (burning with an electric current)
description: Strong for larger, thicker or clustered warts, and it often clears external disease in a single visit under local anaesthetic.

name: CO2 laser removal (external)
description: Useful for precise removal of numerous, awkwardly placed or recurrent warts, and often the preferred tool for delicate or hard-to-reach areas.

name: Internal / urethral warts (hospital, anaesthesia)
description: Reserved for extensive disease, warts inside the urethra, or complex anal cases.

name: HPV vaccine (Gardasil 9), per dose / full course
description: The right choice depends on how many warts you have, where they sit, whether you can reliably apply a cream, and how fast you want them gone.
